description_long: This object is a single slice of toasted white bread, featuring a lightly browned, unevenly toasted surface with a subtle gradient from golden brown at the center to a paler edge. The slice is rectangular with slightly rounded corners and a thin, darker crust running along the perimeter. The surface texture is porous and slightly rough, typical of bread that has been toasted, with small air pockets visible throughout. The sides of the slice are a pale beige, indicating the soft, airy interior of the bread. There are no visible toppings, branding, or packaging, and the bread appears to be unsliced beyond this single piece. The overall appearance suggests a standard piece of toast, commonly found in urban environments such as cafes, street food stalls, or outdoor picnics.
description: A single slice of toasted white bread with a golden-brown, porous surface and a thin, darker crust around the edges. The bread is rectangular with rounded corners and a soft, pale interior.
description_view_0: The front view shows the toasted surface with a prominent golden-brown center and a thin, even crust along the edge.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the slightly uneven edge of the crust and the pale, soft side of the bread.
description_view_2: The back view displays the toasted surface with a lighter center and more pronounced browning along the far edge.
description_view_3: This angled view emphasizes the rounded corners and the transition from the toasted top to the pale side.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust forms a thin, continuous border around the slice, with a slightly darker brown color and a subtle, uneven texture. There are no seeds, flour dusting, or decorative scoring; the crust appears plain and typical of standard white bread.
